name: higgsfield
api_notes: The API allows for image and video generation tasks. While there is a Python SDK, direct REST access is also supported. Note that some third-party sites discussing Higgsfield API access appear to reference wrapper services rather than the native API.

evidence.claim: The Higgsfield API allows developers to generate AI images and videos, with access provided through API keys obtained from the Higgsfield Cloud dashboard.
Higgsfield provides an official MCP (Model Context Protocol) server to connect with AI agents for generation tasks without needing traditional API keys.
Search citation: Build An AI Influencer Automation App Using Higgsfield API & Gemini 3
Search citation: Setting up integration with the AI higgsfield - Questions - n8n Community

access_notes: Developers can sign up for a Higgsfield account at cloud.higgsfield.ai and generate API keys through the dashboard.
one_liner: Higgsfield provides an AI platform for image and video generation, accessible via a native REST API or through an official Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for AI agent integration.
mcp_notes: Higgsfield provides an official MCP server, which allows AI agents to interact with its generation tools using an account-based authentication flow instead of API keys.
auth_notes: Authentication is handled via an API key, which can be provided as a single combined string or separate key and secret pairs.
